allow: Bash(python3 -c " import sys, json lines = sys.stdin.readlines\(\) for line in lines: try: obj = json.loads\(line\) role = obj.get\('type',''\) if obj.get\('type'\) == 'user': msg = obj.get\('message', {}\) content = msg.get\('content', ''\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'USER: {c[\\"text\\"]}'\) elif isinstance\(content, str\): print\(f'USER: {content}'\) elif obj.get\('type'\) == 'assistant': msg = obj.get\('message', {}\) content = msg.get\('content', []\) if isinstance\(content, list\): for c in content: if isinstance\(c, dict\) and c.get\('type'\) == 'text': print\(f'ASSISTANT: {c[\\"text\\"]}'\) except: pass ")
